title: When using aggregate SQL functions, precision & decimal metadata for numeric/decimal type returned is 0,0
key_bug_features: Aggregate SQL functions return incorrect precision for decimals
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE type_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, dval DECIMAL(10,5), nval NUMERIC(10,5));
SELECT AVG(dval), AVG(nval) FROM type_test WHERE dval IS NOT NULL;
